name: Delayed symptoms after accident, AI-diagnosed—sue in Houston?
description: Yes with doc proof—AI irrelevant med evidence.[1]

mainEntity.name: Delayed symptoms after accident, AI-diagnosed—sue in Houston?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes with doc proof—AI irrelevant med evidence.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description:
Yes if linked; AI not medical evidence.[1][4] Texas 2-yr statute.

**Key factors:**
- Doctor records.
- AI discoverable speculation.
- Causation proof.

See MD ASAP; log symptoms. Lawyer ties to accident.[1] File timely.
